aka: I Hate You, I Hate You, I Hate You
trans_title: I Hate You, I Hate You, I Hate You
introduction: SYNOPSISOne day, Mi-hi gets a phone call from Oh Mi-kyung, the first love of her husband, Kim Ji-won. Mi-hi learns that Ji-won and Mi-kyung are still passionately involved with each other and that her husband only stays with her out of a sense of duty. Shocked from this information, Mi-hi drives madly until she gets into an accident which leaves her paralyzed from the waist down. Yun-hi, Mi-hi's sister, comes to take care of her. Ji-won is overcome with guilt. Mi-kyung, who called Mi-hi in order to get back at her, is now sorry for Mi-hi's misfortune. In such a situation, Ji-won and Yun-hi start having an affair. Mi-hi asks for a divorce. Yun-hi convinces Ji-won to kill Mi-hi. In the end, Mi-kyung throws herself into this to solve the situation, destroying Ji-won.故事有一天，三木接到丈夫的初恋哦Migyeong动员令在酒店的休息室。显微镜是三木和她的丈夫金智媛之间金智媛是从旧三木三木谁的事实，没有爱情，除了责任感说热。三木是在一次车祸中旅行，下半身没有这削弱了精神通常太大的影响。身体倒在护理会议三木活的弟弟云辉量，甚至打她的丈夫也挣扎心虚的痛苦。不劳而获的总背叛，而且要破坏家中的三木落尽管内疚由于三木。在这种情况下外遇云辉和支持开始。三木一个人想与丈夫离婚，为了顺利回家云辉是支持计划三木的谋杀阴谋。未到期责任准备看着他们解决抛出他们的支持，因此是注定要失败的。
